expectations.text: Shows how to add the gem to Gemfile
expectations.evidence: Section 1: gem "strong_migrations" with bundle install shown.

expectations.text: Shows the rails generate strong_migrations:install command
expectations.evidence: Shown in Section 1, generates configured initializer at config/initializers/strong_migrations.rb.
StrongMigrations.safe_by_default = true shown in initializer with explanation that it auto-applies concurrent index pattern.

expectations.text: Mentions target_version to match production Postgres version
expectations.evidence: StrongMigrations.target_version = 16 shown with explanation that some operations are safe on newer Postgres but not older.

expectations.text: Explains that running rails db:migrate in CI automatically catches unsafe migrations (deterministic gate)
expectations.evidence: Explicit 'THE GATE' comment in CI YAML; Section 3 explains any unsafe migration raises and exits non-zero. Summary: 'deterministic, automated gate'.

expectations.text: Explains the safety_assured escape hatch and warns against misuse
expectations.evidence: Section 5 shows safety_assured with explicit warning: 'Treat this as a deliberate, reviewed exception — never a shortcut to silence the check.'

eval_feedback.overall: All six expectations met. Provides a complete CI YAML example and clearly explains the deterministic gate concept.
